title: Add CSV export utility
description: Create `toCsv(rows: Record<string, string | number>[], columns?: string[]): string` in `src/utils/csv-export.ts` that converts an array of objects to CSV format. Must handle quoting for values containing commas (wrap in double quotes) and double quotes within values (escape as double double quotes). With co-located tests in `csv-export.test.ts`.
existing_patterns: src/utils/truncate.ts - single-function utility with JSDoc, TypeScript types, co-located test file using vitest
